## Summary

What should be added or improved?

## User Value

How does this improve:
- local-first workflows
- cited retrieval
- portability
- MCP-native coding-agent support

## Scope

Does this touch:
- storage
- retrieval
- MCP server
- bootstrap/import
- export/profile generation
- docs/bench/proof

## Non-goals

What should this request explicitly avoid expanding into?
